dialogues.text: The pharmacy keeps calling. I've been covering it for weeks and I just — I need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I didn't know how to ask. I never know how to ask you.
dialogues.no_response: No. Of course. I'll sort something out. I always do.

dialogues.text: The car's making that sound again. I'm scared to drive at night. Can you help me?
dialogues.yes_response: That's a relief. I've been putting it off. I keep putting things off lately.
dialogues.no_response: It's probably nothing. I'll wait a little longer.

dialogues.text: There's a bill that came. I don't want to go into the details. I just need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. That's one less thing. I have too many things.
dialogues.no_response: I'll sort it. Don't worry about me. I'll sort it.

dialogues.text: I haven't been sleeping. I keep thinking. I just need thirty and I'll stop bothering you.
dialogues.yes_response: You're good. You've always been good. I don't say that enough.
dialogues.no_response: No. Don't worry. I shouldn't have said anything.

dialogues.text: I want to get something for the house. For when people visit. To make things feel normal. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: I want things to look right. I need things to feel like they used to.
dialogues.no_response: It can wait. Things don't have to be perfect.

dialogues.text: I keep starting sentences I don't know how to finish. Can you just — thirty?
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I don't want to talk about the rest. Not today.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. That's okay. I'll figure it out.

dialogues.text: I called you three times last week. I know you're busy. I just need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: That's all I needed. I'm sorry I brought it up. I love you.
dialogues.no_response: No, I know. I know you're dealing with a lot. I know.

dialogues.text: I don't know what to say to you anymore. I don't know how to help. Thirty — can you spare thirty?
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I'll figure out the rest. I always do.

dialogues.text: I bought you something. I can't afford it. I need thirty back, or it bounces. Don't ask me why I bought it.
dialogues.yes_response: I saw it and I thought of you and I just — I'm sorry. I love you so much.
dialogues.no_response: I'll return it. It was a stupid idea. I don't know what I was thinking.

dialogues.text: Just thirty. Please. I don't want to explain. I love you and I just need thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I love you. You know I love you. You've always known.
dialogues.no_response: I know. It's okay. I know.
